forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow before 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 38, with temperatures falling to around 31 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 8. Wind chill values as low as 0. Northwest wind around 7 mph.

weather_report:
In this quiet afternoon in Boston, the air holds a crisp stillness, hinting at the fading light of the day. The sun shines brightly, casting a warm glow upon the city, yet there is a chill that lingers, a push and pull between warmth and the chill of the approaching night. As temperatures dip steadily from their high, the promise of clear skies remains, offering a striking backdrop to the familiar landscape. 

As evening draws near, the cold intensifies, inviting a serene reflection on the day. Bundle up; a sturdy coat layered over something warm will be your best companion. Scarves and gloves will fend off the bite of the wind chill, which suggests that real comfort lies just beyond the confines of your cozy home. With the clear conditions and fading light, an ideal way to embrace this weather would be a leisurely stroll along the Charles River, where the smooth water reflects the last golden rays of sunlight, or perhaps settling into a local café, savoring a warm drink and watching the world pass by with gentle intimacy.
